data.value: You need to add a comment

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this PAT?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this SOS?

data.value: are you sure you want to approve this PAT?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Area?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Distribution?

data.value: are you sure you want to delete this job observation?

data.value: are you sure you want to delete this Lup?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Operation?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this Plant?

data.name: areYouSureYouWantToRemoveThisOperationFromThisDistribution
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this Operation from this distribution?

data.name: areYouSureYouWantToSignTheJobObservationFromThisAccount
data.value: are you sure you want to sign the job observation from this account?

data.name: assyChartConfigDescription
data.value: Workload in which plants, areas, distributions, operations and products can be massively routed with HOE, GOS and CCP routes.

data.name: btnChangeDate
data.value: To change the date, press the button Change Date

data.name: btnChangeHour
data.value: To change the hour, press the button Change Date

data.name: cannotAddThisProductBecauseIsAlreadyAdded
data.value: Can not Add This Product because is already added

data.name: ChecklistCategoriesConfigDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage categories as well as change the order of sequence, you can also create questions dynamically.

data.name: configurationDescription
data.value: Administration module to manage the system information and to make modifications to plants, products, groups, users, etc.

data.name: dragAndDropEvidenceFilesHereOrClick
data.value: Drag and drop evidence files here or click

data.name: enterTheActiveDirectoryUserName
data.value: Enter the active directory user name.

data.name: errorWithUsernamePasswordDoesNotMatch
data.value: Error con Usuario / Contraseña no coinciden.

data.name: errorYouHaveToLogIn
data.value: Error, you have to log in.

data.name: firstTakeTime1
data.value: First enter the Hoe Standard Time 1

data.name: firstTakeTime2
data.value: First enter the Hoe Standard Time 2

data.name: firstTakeTime3
data.value: First enter the Hoe Standard Time 3

data.name: firstTakeTime4
data.value: First enter the Hoe Standard Time 4

data.name: firstTakeTime5
data.value: First enter the Hoe Standard Time 5

data.name: glosaryConfigDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage words along with their meaning.

data.name: groupsConfigDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage groups.

data.name: guidesConfigDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage guides in PDF format for user download.

data.name: HeadCountDescription
data.value: User information is managed and can be uploaded in bulk, as well as modifying previously uploaded information.

data.name: ILUHistoryOfOperationsInUser
data.value: ILU History Of Operations In User

data.name: ILUHistoryOfUserInOperation
data.value: ILU History Of Users In Operation

data.name: imgErrorLup
data.value: Failed to upload Image to Lup

data.name: improvementIdeasAndOrCommentsFromTheOperator
data.value: Improvement ideas and/or comments from the Operator

data.name: jobObservationDoesNotContainAValidArea
data.value: Job Observation does not contain a valid area

data.name: jobObservationDoesNotContainAValidDistribution
data.value: Job Observation does not contain a valid distribution

data.name: jobObservationDoesNotContainAValidOperation
data.value: Job Observation does not contain a valid operation

data.name: jobObservationDoesNotContainAValidPlant
data.value: Job Observation does not contain a valid plant

data.name: jobObservationProgramDescription
data.value: Calendar where you can visualize and program job observations by filters

data.name: jobObservationsDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage job observations forms for zones and staff working within a manufacturing plant.

data.name: LupAddSE
data.value: LUP added in Safety & Environment Pillar

data.name: lupWillBeCreatedWhenTheCreateJobObservationButtonIsClicked
data.value: Lup will be created when the CREATE JOB OBSERVATION button is clicked.

data.name: mantainAndOrImproveTheWorkArea
data.value: Maintain and/or improve the work area

data.name: NoPathFilesMsg
data.value: Please verify that the provided path is correct and corresponds to the expected CodePath. This will ensure that the documents are located in the correct location and can be accessed without any issues.

data.name: onceApprovedItCannotBeModified
data.value: Once approved, it cannot be modified.

data.name: onceSignedItCannotBeModified
data.value: Once signed, it cannot be modified.

data.name: patDescription
data.value: View and modify the skill level of operators for certain distribution operations.

data.name: PathsConfigDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage HOE, CCP and GOS routes.

data.name: plantsConfigDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage plants, areas, distributions, products and operations.

data.name: productsConfigDescription
data.value: Create, update, delete and manage products and distributions.

data.name: selectADistributionAndAnOperation
data.value: Select a distribution and an operation

data.name: sosProgramDescription
data.value: Periodic review whenever the conditions of a standard operation change or an improvement has been introduced.

data.name: theFoldersWithTheInformationWereNotLocated
data.value: The folders with the information provided were not located.

data.name: thereAreNoAreasCreatedForThisPlant
data.value: There are no areas created for this plant.

data.name: thereAreNoDistributionsCreatedForThisArea
data.value: There are no distributions created for this area.

data.name: thereAreNoHistoryVersionsForTheJobObservations
data.value: There are no history versions for the job observations.

data.name: ThereAreNoJobObservationsProgrammedInSOSForThisArea
data.value: There are no job observations programmed in SOS for this area.

data.name: ThereAreNoJobObservationsProgrammedInSOSForThisMonth
data.value: There are no job observations programmed in SOS for this month.

data.name: ThereAreNoJobObservationsProgrammedInSOSForThisPlant
data.value: There are no job observations programmed in SOS for this plant.

data.name: ThereAreNoJobObservationsProgrammedInSOSForThisSSV
data.value: There are no job observations programmed in SOS for this SSV.

data.name: ThereAreNoJobObservationsProgrammedInSOSForThisSupervisor
data.value: There are no job observations programmed in SOS for this supervisor.

data.name: thereAreNoOperationsCreatedForThisDistribution
data.value: There are no operations created for this distribution.

data.name: thereAreNoPastJobObservations
data.value: There are no Past job observations

data.name: thereAreNoProductsCreatedForThisDistribution
data.value: There are no products created for this distribution

data.name: thereAreNoSosCreated
data.value: There are no sos plan created

data.name: thereAreStillNoAreasOfOpportunityDetectedForThisPillar
data.value: There are still no areas of opportunity detected for this pillar.

data.name: thisAreaDoesNotHaveSupervisors
data.value: This Area does not have supervisors

data.name: thisPlantDoesNotHaveJobObservatoins
data.value: This Plant does not have job observations.

data.name: thisSSVDoesNotHaveSubordinates
data.value: This SSV does not have Subordinates.

data.name: thisSupervisorDoesNotHaveOperators
data.value: This Supervisor does not have operators

data.name: timeNG...
data.value: Time is NG, LUP added to Delivery Pillar

data.name: toDoLupDescription
data.value: Update, delete and manage problems (LUP) forms for zones and staff working within a manufacturing plant.

data.name: unregisteredUserAddedToDatabaseForAdmin
data.value: Unregistered user added to database for admin.

data.name: unsignedOnlySSVCanSignIt
data.value: Unsigned only SSV can sign it.

data.name: userNotFoundPleaseContactYourAdmin
data.value: User not found, please contact your administrator.

data.name: usersManagmentConfigDescription
data.value: User information is managed and can be bulk uploaded, and you can also view the information, edit and delete each user.

data.name: WriteDownACommentToChangeTheDate
data.value: Write down a comment to change the date.

data.name: writeDownTheJustificationToCancelTheLup
data.value: Write down the justification to cancel the Lup.

data.name: YouNeedChangeDate
data.value: You need to change the date first
